title: Comments
text: Comments Extended description of the global object. Technical Name: UCOMMENT Expected Value: String. Supports Unicode. Default Value: None Description Use the Comments property to fully describe the object, providing information that may be useful to know about this development object. You can include design decisions and changes, and provide other significant information to serve as application documentation. Applies To Global Objects Modeled Properties Related Links Global Objects A global object is a reusable, technology-independent object that is centrally stored and available to all components running on a given host, regardless of the deployment environment.
